sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66545" key="me/ssaulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μέσσαυλος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μέσσαυλον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσσηγύ</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσπιλ-γύς</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μες</itype>-.</entryFree>
